_comment: V9 baseline (2026-05-10). Set after Class-2 architectural fixes + grams normalize. V7's 95.37% was inflated by false-positive substitutions; V9's 90.43% is honest. Any change that drops coverage below this without explicit approval is a regression.
_tolerance_note: Allow 1% drift on either side. Drops > 1% require investigation; rises > 1% should also be examined to ensure they're real (not from new false-positive matching).
